data.content: Re-implemented all 4 rejected children (e382, 681b, 47a2, 1061) addressing review feedback: scope refinement defaults to disabled, no fallback agent execution, failed jobs re-enqueued with retry limit, beat-detail query invalidation on completion. All quality gates pass (lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 2175 tests pass, build succeeds). Branch: work/foolery-d984-impl-20260322, commit: abf2838153e0.
